arts.ttl: PSG vs Man City: Preview, predictions and lineups
arts.sum: Man City have only managed one point more than Wednesday's opponents having lost two and drawn one of their previous three European excursions. These two Middle Eastern-owned sides have been regular foes in the Champions League since their rapid ascents to the upper echelons of European football, with Man City boasting the superior record in past meetings.

arts.ttl: Manchester City give ‘green light’ to transfer – Set to travel for medical
arts.sum: Kyle Walker is expected to fly to Milan tomorrow to undergo a medical and complete his move from Manchester City. That’s according to Calciomercato, who report that the deal is being finalised between Manchester City and AC Milan at this moment in time. arts.ttl: Absolute fury at Manchester City over transfer – Club go public and even suggest legal action
arts.sum: Earlier today, Africa Foot stated they’ve found out from Juma Bah’s entourage that he’s finalised an agreement with Manchester City. They also said the Real Valladolid player has agreed a six-year deal with the Citizens and will be sent on loan to RC Lens in the winter market. Jordan PSG 24-25 'Wings' Anthem Jacket Priced Up to 750 EUR
arts.sum: PSG has just put all items from the Jordan PSG 24-25 'Wings' collection on sale, with the anthem jacket priced up to 750 EUR.

arts.ttl: Spurs transfer news: Milan Skriniar decides on new club, rejects Premier League move
arts.sum: Tottenham Hotspur seemingly miss out on signing Paris Saint-Germain defender Milan Skriniar with the player pictured with another team's shirt.

arts.ttl: “I’d take him to England” – Insistence big Manchester City offer would have to be accepted
arts.sum: Manchester City have emerged as a credible candidate to land Juventus’ Andrea Cambiaso. There has been talk that the Citizens are prepared to make an offer of €65m for the Italian, but Juventus would want a higher amount to sell the player and they would ideally want to keep him until the summer.
